seoTitle: Cordeaux Heights vs Coree — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cordeaux Heights and Coree. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cordeaux Heights vs Coree: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cordeaux Heights and Coree.
heading: Cordeaux Heights vs Coree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cordeaux Heights, New South Wales and Coree, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coree has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Cordeaux Heights (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cordeaux Heights or Coree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cordeaux Heights has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Coree scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cordeaux Heights scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Coree scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cordeaux Heights or Coree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
